items.blurb: Caitlin Clark To Be 'Very Intentional' About Workload This Season — Indiana Fever guard Caitlin Clark said that she was focused on staying healthy this upcoming season after playing just 13 games last year. items.headline: Wembanyama drops 35 points in playoff debut as Spurs roll past Trail Blazers
items.blurb: Wembanyama drops 35 points in playoff debut as Spurs roll past Trail Blazers — Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points in his playoff debut and the San Antonio Spurs rolled to a 111-98 victory over the Portland Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round Western Conference playoff series Sunday night.

items.blurb: Magic Shock Top-Seeded Pistons 112-101 In Game 1 — Paolo Banchero posted 23 points, nine rebounds, and four assists Sunday night to lead eighth-seeded Orlando Magic past top-seeded Detroit 112-101 in Game 1, extending the longest home playoff losing streak in NBA history. items.headline: Thunder Open Championship Defense With 35-Point Blowout Of Suns
items.blurb: Thunder Open Championship Defense With 35-Point Blowout Of Suns — The Oklahoma City Thunder launched their title defense with a 119-84 dismantling of the Phoenix Suns in Game 1 Sunday at Paycom Center, matching last postseason's opening blowout of the Memphis Grizzlies by again winning by at least 35 points. items.blurb: Celtics Rout 76ers 123-91 In Game 1, Jayson Tatum Posts 25-Point Double-Double — The Boston Celtics opened their first round series with a commanding 123-91 victory over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. items.blurb: History shows Magic's Game 1 win might not be significant — It was an impressive victory but also fits Orlando's recent history of taking a single game in a first-round series.

items.headline: Amari Allen Declares For 2026 NBA Draft
items.blurb: Amari Allen Declares For 2026 NBA Draft — University of Alabama forward Amari Allen announced that he's declaring as an Early Entry Candidate for the 2026 NBA Draft. Allen is leaving the Crimson Tide after his freshman season. The 6-foot-8 forward appeared in 32 games for Alabama as a freshman. Allen averaged 11.4 points, 6.9 rebounds, 3.1 assists and a steal per game. He shot 44.6% from the field

items.blurb: NBA Announces Finalists For MVP, Rookie Of The Year, Coach Of The Year, Other Awards — The NBA announced the finalists for several different awards on Sunday night. items.headline: Raptors’ defence must step up after Game 1 letdown
items.blurb: Raptors’ defence must step up after Game 1 letdown — After finishing the season with the fifth-ranked defence in the NBA, the Raptors had major problems slowing down the Cavaliers in Game 1. They must search for answers at that end of the court if they want a chance to get back in the series.

items.headline: Raptors’ Immanuel Quickley questionable for Game 2 vs. Cavaliers
items.blurb: Raptors’ Immanuel Quickley questionable for Game 2 vs. Cavaliers — The Toronto Raptors will hope to have some backcourt reinforcement when they take the court for Game 2 of their first-round playoff series against the Cleveland Cavaliers.

items.headline: Holmgren beats buzzer with deep three to stretch Thunder lead in first
items.blurb: Holmgren beats buzzer with deep three to stretch Thunder lead in first — Watch as Oklahoma City Thunder forward Chet Holmgren drains a three-point shot at the buzzer to extend the lead in a dominant first quarter over the Phoenix Suns.

items.headline: Kingston Flemings Declares For 2026 NBA Draft
items.blurb: Kingston Flemings Declares For 2026 NBA Draft — University of Houston guard Kingston Flemings has declared as an Early Entry Candidate for the 2026 NBA Draft. Flemings is declaring after his freshman season with the Cougars. ESPN has Flemings ranked as the seventh-best prospect in their Top 100 for the 2026 draft. He's the fourth-ranked guard behind Darryn Peterson, Keaton Wagler and Darius Acuff

items.headline: Jayson Tatum leads Celtics to rout of 76ers in series opener
items.blurb: Jayson Tatum leads Celtics to rout of 76ers in series opener — Jayson Tatum had 25 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists in his first playoff game since rupturing his right Achilles tendon last season, and the Boston Celtics rolled past the Philadelphia 76ers 123-91 in Game 1 of their Eastern Conference first-round matchup on Sunday.

items.headline: Why it will be challenging for Raptors to solve problems presented by Cavs
items.blurb: Why it will be challenging for Raptors to solve problems presented by Cavs — Michael Grange and Danielle Michaud share solutions discussed by the Toronto Raptors and examine other potential adjustments the team could make after a challenging Game 1 loss to the Cleveland Cavaliers.

items.headline: Raptors’ Rajakovic on how the team will find Ingram more shots
items.blurb: Raptors’ Rajakovic on how the team will find Ingram more shots — Toronto Raptors head coach Darko Rajakovic speaks with media about how his team plans to find Brandon Ingram more shots after the all-star took only nine in Game 1 on Saturday.

items.headline: ‘It’s just gotta be more’: Ingram reflects on Game 1 usage
items.blurb: ‘It’s just gotta be more’: Ingram reflects on Game 1 usage — Toronto Raptors wing Brandon Ingram discusses his Game 1 usage, the coverage the Cleveland Cavaliers used against him and his shot diet.

items.headline: NBA Awards Finalists To Be Announced Sunday Night On NBC
items.blurb: NBA Awards Finalists To Be Announced Sunday Night On NBC — The NBA announced that finalists for awards for the 2025-26 season will be announced on Sunday night on NBC. Finalists will be revealed in two different windows, with one set at 6:00 PM ET before the Detroit Pistons host the Orlando Magic. The second set will be revealed at halftime of the Pistons-Magic games. Revealed pregame: Clutch Play

items.blurb: NBA Scheduled To Hold 2026 Draft Pick Tiebreakers On Monday — The NBA is set to hold tiebreakers for selections in the 2026 NBA Draft on Monday, April 20. If the tie is between lottery teams, these tiebreakers set the order pre-Draft Lottery. The actual lottery odds will be split evenly between the tied teams. items.blurb: Kristaps Porzingis To Take Some Time To Figure Out Career Direction — Kristaps Porzingis wasn't happy his team lost in the Play-In Tournament, but was happy that he had a productive finish for the Golden State Warriors. items.blurb: Five moves Warriors need to make to return to glory — With a roster full of players on the wrong side of 30, two players recovering from serious knee injuries and multiple expiring contracts, the Warriors are at another transition point.

items.headline: Devin Booker: Drops team-high 23 points
items.blurb: Devin Booker: Drops team-high 23 points — Booker closed Sunday's 119-84 loss to Oklahoma City in Game 1 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs with 23 points (8-17 FG, 2-5 3Pt, 5-7 FT), six rebounds and two assists across 33 minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.headline: Anthony Edwards: Questionable for Game 2
items.blurb: Anthony Edwards: Questionable for Game 2 — Edwards (knee) is listed as questionable for Monday's Game 2 of the Western Conference first-round playoff series against the Nuggets. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.blurb: OG Anunoby: Probable for Game 2 — Anunoby (ankle) is listed as probable for Monday's Game 2 of the Eastern Conference first-round playoff series against the Hawks. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.headline: Jordan Goodwin: Won't return Sunday
items.blurb: Jordan Goodwin: Won't return Sunday — Goodwin has been ruled out for the rest of Game 1 of the Western Conference first-round playoff series against the Thunder on Sunday due to left calf soreness, Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.headline: Onyeka Okongwu: Questionable for Game 2
items.blurb: Onyeka Okongwu: Questionable for Game 2 — Okongwu is questionable for Monday's Game 2 of the Eastern Conference first-round playoff series against the Knicks due to right knee inflammation. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
